label: OpenAI launches GPT-five featuring extended reasoning and improved token efficiency
label_zh: OpenAI 推出 GPT-five，具備更強的推理能力和更高的代幣效率

timeline.title: OpenAI Expands GPT-5.4 Series with High-Efficiency Mini and Nano Models for Agentic Workflows
timeline.title_zh: OpenAI 擴展 GPT-5.4 系列，為智能代理工作流程推出高效迷你及納米級模型
timeline.sub_title: Following the flagship GPT-5.4 launch, OpenAI introduces faster, cost-effective variants designed for high-volume subagent tasks, offering significant speed gains and expanded accessibility for free users.
timeline.sub_title_zh: 繼旗艦 GPT-5.4 發布後，OpenAI 推出更快速、更具成本效益的變體，專為高容量子代理任務設計，提供顯著的速度提升並擴大免費用戶的可及性。
timeline.summary:
OpenAI has officially broadened its latest model lineup with the release of GPT-5.4 mini and GPT-5.4 nano. These new variants are engineered to provide a high-performance-to-latency balance, specifically targeting high-volume workloads and autonomous subagent architectures. The launch follows the earlier debut of the flagship GPT-5.4, further cementing OpenAI's strategy to provide a tiered stack of models capable of handling varying levels of complexity and cost requirements.

GPT-5.4 mini is positioned as a powerful yet efficient model, reported to run more than twice as fast as the previous GPT-5 mini while approaching the reasoning capabilities of the full GPT-5.4 model on key benchmarks such as SWE-Bench Pro and OSWorld-Verified. It features a significant 400,000-token context window in the API, allowing it to process extensive documentation and maintain context during multi-step reasoning tasks. For [ref:8, 10, 6] the first time, OpenAI is making these advanced reasoning capabilities available to Free and Go users in ChatGPT through the new "Thinking" feature, while paid subscribers will use the mini model as a rate-limit fallback for the larger GPT-5.4 Thinking model.

The GPT-5.4 nano model represents the leanest entry in the series, designed exclusively for the API to serve as a cost-effective solution for classification, data extraction, and ranking tasks. Industry analysts note that the introduction of these models facilitates a "layered" AI approach, where a larger model like GPT-5.4 acts as a project manager while mini and nano variants operate as subagents to execute narrower, parallel tasks. This architectural shift toward agentic workflows was echoed by industry leaders, including Nvidia CEO Jensen Huang, who highlighted the move toward autonomous platforms that can act with minimal human supervision.

In terms of efficiency, the 5.4 series has demonstrated a 47% reduction in token usage for complex tool-based tasks compared to earlier versions, effectively lowering the total cost of ownership for developers. This efficiency, combined with new native "Computer Use" capabilities that allow the models to interpret screenshots and navigate digital interfaces, places OpenAI in direct competition with high-efficiency offerings from Google and Anthropic. The release marks a strategic effort by OpenAI to dominate the burgeoning market for autonomous AI agents by providing the necessary infrastructure for both high-level reasoning and rapid, low-cost task execution.
timeline.summary_zh:
OpenAI 正式擴展其最新模型陣容，發布了 GPT-5.4 mini 和 GPT-5.4 nano。這些新變體旨在提供高效能與低延遲的平衡，特別針對高容量工作負載和自主子代理架構。此次發布緊隨旗艦 GPT-5.4 的早期亮相，進一步鞏固了 OpenAI 提供能夠處理不同複雜度和成本需求的模型堆疊的策略。
GPT-5.4 mini 被定位為一款強大而高效的模型，據報導其運行速度比前一代 GPT-5 mini 快兩倍以上，同時在 SWE-Bench Pro 和 OSWorld-Verified 等關鍵基準測試中接近完整 GPT-5.4 模型的推理能力。它在 API 中具有顯著的 400,000 個 token 上下文窗口，使其能夠處理大量的文檔並在多步驟推理任務中維持上下文。OpenAI 首次透過新的「Thinking」功能，將這些先進的推理能力提供給 ChatGPT 的免費及 Go 用戶，而付費訂閱者將使用 mini 模型作為大型 GPT-5.4 Thinking 模型的速率限制備用選項。[ref:8, 10, 6]
GPT-5.4 nano 模型是該系列中最精簡的版本，專為 API 設計，作為分類、數據提取和排序任務的成本效益解決方案。行業分析師指出，這些模型的引入促進了一種「分層」AI 方法，其中像 GPT-5.4 這樣的大型模型充當項目經理，而 mini 和 nano 變體則作為子代理執行更狹窄、並行的任務。這種轉向代理工作流程的架構轉變也得到了包括 Nvidia CEO Jensen Huang 在內的行業領導者的呼應，他強調了朝向能夠以最少人為監管進行操作的自主平台的發展。
在效率方面，與早期版本相比，5.4 系列在複雜工具任務中的 token 使用量減少了 47%，有效降低了開發者的總體擁有成本。這種效率，加上允許模型解釋屏幕截圖和導航數字界面的新原生「電腦使用」功能，使 OpenAI 能夠與 Google 和 Anthropic 等公司的高效產品展開直接競爭。此次發布標誌著 OpenAI 一項戰略性努力，旨在透過提供高層次推理和快速、低成本任務執行的必要基礎設施，主導不斷增長的自主 AI 代理市場。

timeline.title: OpenAI Unveils GPT-5.4 Mini and Nano Models for High-Speed Reasoning and Efficient Coding
timeline.title_zh: OpenAI 推出具備擴展推理能力的高效 GPT-5.4 Mini 及 Nano 模型
timeline.sub_title: The new lightweight variants offer near-flagship intelligence with improved token efficiency and a 400,000-token context window, empowering developers to build complex multi-agent systems at a lower cost.
timeline.sub_title_zh: GPT-5.4 系列的擴展引入了專為代理工作流設計的快速、高性價比變體，為開發者和消費者提供更佳的代標效率及專業級推理能力。
timeline.summary:
On March 17, 2026, OpenAI officially expanded its flagship GPT-5 series with the release of GPT-5.4 mini and GPT-5.4 nano. These models represent the company’s most capable small-scale offerings to date, designed specifically to bridge the gap between high-tier reasoning and the low-latency requirements of production-level AI agents. Following the debut of the standard GPT-5.4 model earlier this month, these new compact versions prioritize token efficiency and speed, catering to developers who need to balance cost-effectiveness with professional-grade performance.

The technical benchmarks for GPT-5.4 mini are particularly striking, as the model nearly matches the performance of the much larger GPT-5.4 across several critical evaluations. In coding tasks, the mini version achieved a 54.4 percent score on the SWE-Bench Pro benchmark, trailing the full model’s 57.7 percent by only a narrow margin. Perhaps [ref:2] most significantly, the mini model showed a massive leap in computer control capabilities, scoring 72.1 percent on the OSWorld-Verified benchmark, which is more than 30 percentage points higher than the previous generation’s mini variant. These gains [ref:2] allow the model to operate as a highly capable "subagent" within broader AI workflows.

Central to this launch is OpenAI’s new subagent architecture, which is being showcased through its Codex platform. In this setup, a high-intelligence model like GPT-5.4 Thinking handles complex planning and coordination, while simpler, more repetitive subtasks—such as scanning codebases or processing large supporting documents—are delegated to the GPT-5.4 mini. This hierarchical [ref:2] approach is designed to drastically reduce the total cost of ownership for enterprises. According to internal data, GPT-5.4 mini consumes only 30 percent of the standard GPT-5.4 token quota when integrated into Codex, offering a 3x reduction in cost for developers without sacrificing task accuracy.

Pricing for the new models reflects their position as efficient workhorses. GPT-5.4 mini is available via the API at $0.75 per million input tokens and $4.50 per million output tokens, while the ultra-lightweight GPT-5.4 nano is priced at $0.20 per million input and $1.25 per million output. Both models support [ref:2] a massive 400,000-token context window and a 128,000-token output limit, allowing them to process and generate extensive amounts of information in a single pass. This capacity is already [ref:4, 1] being utilized by early adopters like Notion and Hebbia to improve citation recall and source attribution in large-scale document analysis.

OpenAI has also integrated GPT-5.4 mini into ChatGPT, making it available to Free and Go tier users through the existing “Thinking” feature. For Plus and Pro subscribers, the model serves as an intelligent rate-limit fallback, ensuring that users maintain access to high-reasoning capabilities even after exceeding their primary GPT-5.4 quotas. As OpenAI continues to battle rivals like Anthropic for dominance in the AI software engineering market, the introduction of these speed-optimized, reasoning-capable small models signals a strategic shift toward making advanced AI more accessible and scalable for global enterprise deployment.
timeline.summary_zh:
OpenAI 正式擴展其旗艦模型陣容，推出 GPT-5.4 mini 和 GPT-5.4 nano 兩款高速變體，旨在將先進的推理能力和大規模代標（token）效率應用於更廣泛的範疇。是次發布標誌着 GPT-5.4 系列推出的完成，該系列於本月初隨旗艦「思考」（Thinking）模型的首次亮相而展開。這些新型小規模模型的設計初衷，是以遠低於前代產品的成本和延遲，在編程和結構化數據任務中提供接近旗艦級的表現。

根據今日發布的技術規格，GPT-5.4 mini 的速度比其前代快兩倍以上，同時在多模態理解和工具調用方面保持顯著領先。新架構的一個關鍵亮点是在 Codex 等專業版本中實驗性支援 100 萬代標的上下文視窗，使其與 Google 和 Anthropic 的競爭產品齊頭並進。開發者現在可以利用 mini 模型進行高強度的「代理」（agentic）工作流，由較大的管理模型處理規劃，而多個 mini 「執行」模型則同步執行子任務，如代碼分析或文檔處理。

代標效率是新版本的核心支柱，旨在應對企業對更具可持續性的人工智能開支日益增長的需求。GPT-5.4 mini 的定價約為每百萬輸入代標 2.50 美元，每百萬輸出代標 15 美元，快取輸入更可享 90% 的折扣。OpenAI 指出，nano 變體專為分類和數據提取等重複性、高業務量的任務而優化，在這些任務中，近乎即時的響應時間至關重要。兩款模型均受益於旗艦 5.4 引入的「思考」架構，使其在收到提示時能投入更多計算時間處理複雜問題，從而減少事實錯誤並在 GDPval 等專業基準測試中表現更佳。[ref:7]

除了原始性能外，是次發布還集成了用於代理軟件操作的新原生能力。OpenAI 強調了模型進行「氛圍編程」（vibe code）的能力——這是一種協作方式，讓人工智能在極少的人為干預下管理複雜的軟件環境。這得益於與專業工具的改進集成，包括新的 ChatGPT for Excel 插件及更新的 Codex 技能，使模型能以空前的結構準確性操作電子表格和簡報。在初級投資銀行任務的內部基準測試中，GPT-5.4 系列的成功率達到 87.5%，較早期 GPT-5.2 版本的 68.4% 有大幅提升。[ref:2]

從今天起，免費版及 Go 版用戶可透過 ChatGPT 介面中的「思考」功能使用 GPT-5.4 mini，當達到旗艦模型限制時，它可作為高容量的後備選擇。mini 及 nano 變體的 API 訪問現已向所有級別的開發者開放，信號顯示企業領域正向「小模型」主導地位進行戰略轉移。隨着主要人工智能實驗室趨向每兩至三週發布一次更新，OpenAI 的最新發布鞏固了其在市場中的地位，因市場正日益看重成本效益和專業推理，而非單純的模型規模。
